description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in manual mode was traveling south on Bryant Street near 25th Street in San Francisco when the 
roof-mounted front and rear sensor pods on the passenger side of the vehicle made contact with metal rods protruding beyond the length of a
 pickup truck (Vehicle 2). At that time, Vehicle 2 was parked in a driveway and facing west along Bryant Street. The sensor pods on the 
Zoox vehicle sustained damage. There were no reported injuries, and police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
